ceterum

Starts the default branch of an elige or discerne statement.

Aliases: default

Syntax: ceterum

Category

control-flow

Related

  • [elige](/corpus/elige.html)
  • [discerne](/corpus/discerne.html)

Examples

examples/corpus/ceterum/ceterum.fab (canonical · keyword)

Starts the default branch of an elige or discerne statement.

# ceterum — default elige arm
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   defaultClause :← 'ceterum' block
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   Scalar stdout smoke (see body).
#
# BACKEND:
#   Cross-ref: elige/ceterum.fab.
#

incipit {
    fixum _ tag ← "z"
    elige tag {
        casu "a" { nota "a" }
        ceterum { nota "default" }
    }
}

Expected output:

default
Sources
  • ["examples/corpus/ceterum/ceterum.fab"]
